---
title: "Education Readiness Risk Modeling in R"
output:
  github_document: default
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
geometry: margin=0.8in
---

```{r build, include=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source(file.path("R", "generate_synthetic_data.R"))
source(file.path("R", "fit_risk_models.R"))
```

```{r report, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source(file.path("R", "render_markdown_report.R"))
cat(readLines(file.path("reports", "statistical_risk_modeling_report.md")), sep = "\n")
```
